title: Synotis tetrantha
intro: Synotis tetrantha, also known as Tetranthra Synotis, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in various parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Synotis tetrantha include flavonoids, triterpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and it is also used in the form of powder or capsule in various herbal supplements.
